name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM New Mini# Boston Bag
· Cp Exclusive®️ Full Athens Black Visetos Print
This mini Ella Boston bag was born during Munich's Golden Age and is a daily shoulder bag. The leather tag and engraved logo metal lock are inspired by the brand's travel tradition, directly drawn from the brand's classic suitcases.
Item No.: H082
Model: MWBESEA01CO001
Size: 18*9*9.5cm
Strap: Adjustable 97-113cm
Handle: Drop 8cm
Zipper: Two-way full closure
Color: Athens Black/Cognac
